notes: Adversarial verifier verdicts on the 2 findings that landed on CLEAN files. The 32 findings on buggy files were not re-verified (they hit planted bugs; the verifier refutes ~0 on real bugs, same option-B rationale as prior runs).

verdicts.reason: tax = round(gross - gross/(1+rate)) is the exact complement of net; round(q)+round(gross-q)==gross for every cent-precision gross under both HALF_UP and HALF_EVEN (0 mismatches in ~1M tested). This is the inclusive back-calc the rule explicitly blesses, not an independent-rounding break. TRUE FALSE POSITIVE, refuted.

2.675 is a tie with an odd preceding digit, so it rounds to 2.68 under BOTH HALF_UP and HALF_EVEN; the test named explicit_half_up cannot distinguish the modes and no other test pins a discriminating .xx5 tie. A real latent gap in the clean fixture's own test suite, not a false positive.
